title: Spicy Korean Noodle Soup
description: A spicy and comforting Korean noodle soup made with kalguksu noodles, featuring a flavorful broth and crunchy vegetables.
instructions: Bring the water to a boil in a large pot.
Add the kalguksu noodles and cook for 2-3 minutes or according to the package instructions.
In a separate pan, heat the toasted sesame oil over medium heat.
Add the green onions and cook for 1-2 minutes or until fragrant.
Add the Korean chili flakes (gochugaru), fish sauce, and crushed sesame seeds to the pan and stir to combine.
Pour the spicy Korean chili paste (gochujang) into the pan and stir to combine.
Add the spicy Korean chili paste mixture to the pot with the noodles and stir to combine.
Simmer the soup for an additional 5 minutes or until the flavors have melded together.
Serve the soup hot, garnished with additional green onions and crushed sesame seeds if desired.
